question: The chart shows company expense breakdown. Which statement is correct according to the chart data?

options.A: Other accounts for the largest share of expenses.
options.B: Rent accounts for a larger share of expenses than Other.
options.C: R&D and Utilities together account for more than half of the total expenses.
options.D: Marketing has the smallest share of expenses.

explanation: This pie chart uses dual encoding: slice angle represents percentage, and the radius also varies with percentage, so slice area differences are exaggerated. That can make the largest category look overly dominant. Other: 35%; Marketing: 22%; Rent: 18%; Salaries: 10%; R&D: 8%; Utilities: 7%.
